---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new agent, could it be a plugin (`plugins/`) instead of a core change?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, examples, related projects.
